explanation: With a forecasted 30.5°C day, fan demand will be strong, but only 12 units on hand versus 39.2 predicted sales means a significant shortfall; a reorder is essential.
Mild 24.2°C weather and 36 units available easily cover the 22.1 forecasted demand, so no reorder is needed.
A warm 28.3°C day will drive high demand (33.3 units), but only 18 in stock leaves a large gap; a reorder is required to avoid running out.
Hot 32.8°C weather will boost demand to 24.9 units, but with only 20 in stock and a slim safety buffer, a small top-up is prudent.
Cooler 22.8°C weather and 27 units available easily cover the 17.9 forecasted sales, so no reorder is needed.
With 27.7°C forecasted and 38.8 units expected to sell, only 9 in stock means a large deficit; a substantial reorder is necessary.
